method: docs + code + SQL migrations + contract schemas; evidence paths use project-relative path:line.

entities.name: 门店助手 Agent V1 / storepilot-ai
entities.description: 面向多商家多门店经营分析、补货建议、采购闭环的 TypeScript monorepo。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L50-L82

entities.name: storepilot-ai
entities.description: pnpm workspace；scripts 覆盖 build/lint/test/migrate/dev

entities.name: @storepilot/agent-service
entities.description: Hono + Mastra + MySQL + MCP + SSE + 安全层

entities.name: @storepilot/shared-contracts
entities.description: Intent/Draft/Strategy/Skill/Error/MCP Zod 契约

entities.name: @storepilot/mcp-mock-server
entities.description: 注册 7 个 MCP 工具；仅 dev/CI，生产禁用

entities.name: tools/migrate-runner
entities.description: 执行 migrations/*.sql

entities.name: tools/api-key-issuer
entities.description: 写入 agent_api_key，支持 sk-agent-*

entities.name: tools/seed-strategy
entities.description: 维护商家/门店策略 JSON

entities.name: deploy
entities.description: 生产部署、健康检查、灰度/回滚相关文件

entities.name: docs
entities.description: PRD、设计指南、原始本体模型、21 切片任务卡

entities.name: BUSINESS_DAILY_REPORT
entities.description: 经营日报

entities.name: BUSINESS_MONTHLY_REPORT
entities.description: 经营月报

entities.name: REPLENISHMENT_PLAN
entities.description: 补货计划/预测

entities.name: ADJUST_REPLENISHMENT_DRAFT
entities.description: 调整补货草稿

entities.name: CONFIRM_CREATE_PURCHASE_ORDER
entities.description: 确认创建采购单

entities.name: CANCEL_REPLENISHMENT_DRAFT
entities.description: 取消补货草稿/挂起采购

entities.name: COLLECT_REQUIREMENT
entities.description: 需求收集

entities.name: GENERAL_QA
entities.description: 通用问答

entities.name: EXPLAIN_METRIC
entities.description: 指标解释

entities.name: MULTI_INTENT
entities.description: 多意图

entities.name: UNKNOWN
entities.description: 低置信度兜底

entities.name: business_daily_report
entities.description: 风险 LOW，状态 enabled；意图：BUSINESS_DAILY_REPORT, EXPLAIN_METRIC；工具：getStoreReportConfig, queryStoreSalesSummary, queryCategorySalesRatio, queryProductSalesRank, queryInventoryOverview

entities.name: business_monthly_report
entities.description: 风险 LOW，状态 enabled；意图：BUSINESS_MONTHLY_REPORT；工具：queryStoreSalesSummary, queryCategorySalesRatio, queryProductSalesRank, queryInventoryOverview

entities.name: replenishment_forecast
entities.description: 风险 MEDIUM，状态 enabled；意图：REPLENISHMENT_PLAN；工具：queryReplenishmentBaseData

entities.name: replenishment_adjustment
entities.description: 风险 MEDIUM，状态 enabled；意图：ADJUST_REPLENISHMENT_DRAFT；工具：(无 MCP 工具；本地草稿调整)

entities.name: purchase_order_create
entities.description: 风险 HIGH，状态 gray；意图：CONFIRM_CREATE_PURCHASE_ORDER, CANCEL_REPLENISHMENT_DRAFT；工具：createPurchaseOrder

entities.name: getStoreReportConfig
entities.description: 门店报表配置；返回 currency/locale/cards/timezone

entities.name: queryStoreSalesSummary
entities.description: 销售额、订单数、客单价等经营汇总

entities.name: queryCategorySalesRatio
entities.description: 品类销售占比，ratio 范围 0..1

entities.name: queryProductSalesRank
entities.description: 商品排行，topN 1..500，products max 500

entities.name: queryInventoryOverview
entities.description: 库存概览、低库存/缺货/库存价值

entities.name: queryReplenishmentBaseData
entities.description: 补货基础数据：SKU、库存、销量、在途、lead time、供应商

entities.name: createPurchaseOrder
entities.description: 创建 ERP 采购单；source 固定 AI_REPLENISHMENT_AGENT，idempotencyKey 必须等于 sourceDraftId

entities.name: agent_skill_def
entities.description: Skill 元数据、风险、状态、意图、工具白名单

properties.relationHint: agent_skill_def.skill_code 与 5 个 workflow id 一致

entities.name: agent_merchant_strategy
entities.description: 平台默认/商家级策略 JSON

properties.relationHint: 策略基础层 / Merchant 层

entities.name: agent_store_strategy
entities.description: 门店级策略 JSON

entities.name: replenishment_draft
entities.description: 补货草稿、状态、items、过期、采购单号

properties.relationHint: AgentSession 创建并提交为 PurchaseOrder

entities.name: replenishment_adjustment_log
entities.description: 调整指令审计

entities.name: agent_run_log
entities.description: Agent 请求审计

entities.name: agent_skill_run_log
entities.description: Skill 调用审计

entities.name: agent_api_key
entities.description: API Key 租户鉴权

entities.name: strategy_invalidation
entities.description: 策略缓存失效信号

properties.relationHint: StrategyEngine LRU 重新加载触发

entities.name: agent_session
entities.description: 会话及 HITL 5 字段

entities.name: mastra_workflow_snapshot
entities.description: Mastra workflow 状态快照

entities.name: mastra_workflow_event
entities.description: Mastra workflow 步骤事件

entities.name: mastra_workflow_suspend
entities.description: HITL suspend payload

entities.name: business_daily_report
entities.description: Mastra workflow，步骤：generate-daily-report

entities.name: business_monthly_report
entities.description: Mastra workflow，步骤：prepare-monthly-input, query-sales-summary-monthly, query-category-ratio-monthly, query-product-rank-monthly, query-inventory-overview-monthly, compose-monthly-report

entities.name: purchase_order_create
entities.description: Mastra workflow，步骤：preview-purchase-order, ask-confirm, create-purchase-order

entities.name: replenishment_adjustment
entities.description: Mastra workflow，步骤：load-active-draft, extract-instruction, apply-instruction, persist-adjustment

entities.name: replenishment_forecast
entities.description: Mastra workflow，步骤：compute-suggest-qty, persist-draft

entities.name: 商家
entities.description: 策略、Skill 启用、数据隔离、报表配置的一级边界。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L161-L195

entities.name: 门店
entities.description: 商家下的经营单元；补货、日报、库存、销售以门店为主要执行范围。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L198-L213

entities.name: 用户
entities.description: 发起对话和确认采购单的操作者。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L86-L129

entities.name: 品类
entities.description: SKU 的分类维度，用于占比、策略和补货分组。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L262-L329

entities.name: SKU
entities.description: 商品最小经营与补货对象。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L262-L329

entities.name: 供应商
entities.description: 采购单和补货候选项的供货来源。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L262-L329

entities.name: 销售汇总
entities.description: 经营日报/月报使用的销售额、订单数、客单价等。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L332-L410

entities.name: 库存快照
entities.description: SKU 当前库存、低库存、缺货、库存价值等。

entities.name: 补货草稿
entities.description: 补货预测生成，可调整、确认、提交为采购单。

entities.name: 补货明细
entities.description: 补货草稿中的 SKU 建议数量和原因。

entities.name: 调整指令
entities.description: 用户自然语言调整草稿后的结构化指令。

entities.name: 采购单
entities.description: 确认后调用 ERP MCP 创建的采购单。

entities.name: 策略
entities.description: 平台/商家/门店三级合并后的生效策略。

entities.name: Agent 会话
entities.description: 承载 sessionId、租户上下文和 HITL 挂起状态。

entities.name: 报表视图
entities.description: 经营报表的卡片、洞察和 Markdown 输出。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L117-L129

entities.name: 健康检查聚合
entities.description: GET /health, /health/db, /health/mcp, /health/model, /health/ready

entities.name: GET /health
entities.description: liveness，不做 IO。

entities.name: GET /health/db
entities.description: 检查 SELECT 1 和表数量 >= 11。

entities.name: GET /health/mcp
entities.description: MCP 工具白名单检查。

entities.name: GET /health/model
entities.description: 模型 ping。

entities.name: GET /health/ready
entities.description: readiness = db + mcp，不含 model。

entities.name: POST /v1/chat/completions
entities.description: OpenAI-compatible SSE 桥入口。

entities.name: GET mcp-mock /health
entities.description: 返回 mock 状态、协议版本、fixtureProfile、toolCount。

entities.name: 不能编造业务数据
entities.description: 销售额、库存、SKU、采购数量必须来自 MCP Tool 返回或已保存草稿。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L37-L47

entities.name: 创建采购单必须确认
entities.description: AI 不能绕过确认；采购单创建前必须展示结构化明细并获得明确确认。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L41-L43

entities.name: 不能从 Markdown 反解析提单
entities.description: 采购单明细必须来自 ReplenishmentDraft.items / finalSuggestQty，不得从展示文本提取。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L1137-L1150

entities.name: 商家/门店硬隔离
entities.description: 查询、草稿、策略、采购单绑定 merchantId/storeId；DraftManager 所有 SQL 带租户条件。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L1154-L1164; packages/agent-service/src/safety/draft-manager.ts:L15-L21

entities.name: 策略合并优先级
entities.description: EffectiveStrategy 由 Store > Merchant > Platform 合并；合并失败降级并记录原因。

entities.name: 禁止自动采购单
entities.description: StrategySchema 中 allowAutoPurchaseOrder 固定 false。

entities.name: 写操作必须用户确认
entities.description: StrategySchema 中 requireUserConfirmForWrite 固定 true。

entities.name: SkillDef 与 Workflow 严格一致
entities.description: 启动期读取 agent_skill_def enabled/gray 行，与 5 个 workflow id 严格相等，否则启动失败。

entities.name: 灰度/禁用网关
entities.description: disabled 或 gray 但 merchantId 不在 GRAY_MERCHANT_WHITELIST 时抛 SKILL_NOT_AVAILABLE。

entities.name: MCP 工具白名单严格相等
entities.description: 启动期 found.sort 与 7 工具 expected.sort 严格相等，并检查 input/output schema 非空。

entities.name: Chat Completions 请求不允许工具调用字段
entities.description: OpenAiRequestSchema 拒绝 tools/tool_choice/functions/function_call/response_format 等字段。

entities.name: 禁止工具调用泄漏给前端
entities.description: OutputGuard 扫描 tool_calls/function_call/tool_call_id 等禁用 token，命中记录 P0 hash。

entities.name: 数字一致性校验
entities.description: 输出数字必须来自允许集/派生值；不用 LLM judge。

entities.name: 草稿 7 状态机
entities.description: DRAFT→WAIT_CONFIRM/CANCELLED/EXPIRED；WAIT_CONFIRM→CONFIRMED/CANCELLED/EXPIRED；CONFIRMED→SUBMITTED/FAILED/CANCELLED；终态不可再流转。

entities.name: 草稿 30 分钟过期与 5 分钟兜底
entities.description: replenishment_draft expires_at 默认 30 分钟，idx_draft_tenant_recent 支持 session 漂移找最近草稿。

entities.name: HITL resume 互斥锁
entities.description: resume_locked_at 10 秒租约，防止并发确认重复提交。

entities.name: 采购单幂等键
entities.description: createPurchaseOrder 输入要求 idempotencyKey === sourceDraftId；source 固定 AI_REPLENISHMENT_AGENT。

entities.name: 健康检查语义
entities.description: /health 是 liveness 不做 IO；/health/ready 聚合 db+mcp，不包含 model。

entities.name: 优雅停机顺序
entities.description: 停止接收新请求，等待 SSE，abort inflight，释放 MCP，停止 cron，关闭 DB pool。

entities.name: 生产 CORS/数字校验保护
entities.description: 生产 CORS 不能 *；生产环境不能关闭数字一致性校验。

entities.name: Mock 服务生产禁用
entities.description: mcp-mock-server 在 NODE_ENV=production 时 process.exit(1)。

relations.description: Skill business_daily_report 对应 workflow business_daily_report
Skill business_monthly_report 对应 workflow business_monthly_report
Skill replenishment_forecast 对应 workflow replenishment_forecast
Skill replenishment_adjustment 对应 workflow replenishment_adjustment
Skill purchase_order_create 对应 workflow purchase_order_create
根项目包含 workspace 与工具链。
主服务包。
共享契约包。
MCP mock 包。
主服务依赖共享契约。
提供 OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions SSE 桥。
提供 5 个健康检查路由。
通过 MCPClient 调用 7 个 ERP MCP 工具。
mock-server 注册 7 个工具并支持 fixtures。
商家拥有多个门店。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L131-L153

relations.description: 门店拥有 SKU 库存快照。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L131-L153

relations.description: 门店拥有经营销售汇总。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L131-L153

relations.description: 品类包含 SKU。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L131-L153

relations.description: 会话创建补货草稿。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L131-L153

relations.description: 草稿包含补货明细。
草稿可被用户调整指令修改。
确认后以 createPurchaseOrder 写入 ERP 采购单。
business_daily_report 需要 MCP 工具 getStoreReportConfig
business_daily_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryStoreSalesSummary
business_daily_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryCategorySalesRatio
business_daily_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryProductSalesRank
business_daily_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryInventoryOverview
business_monthly_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryStoreSalesSummary
business_monthly_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryCategorySalesRatio
business_monthly_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryProductSalesRank
business_monthly_report 需要 MCP 工具 queryInventoryOverview
replenishment_forecast 需要 MCP 工具 queryReplenishmentBaseData
purchase_order_create 需要 MCP 工具 createPurchaseOrder
补货预测计算并持久化草稿。
每次调整写审计日志。
确认后调用 ERP 创建采购单。
markSubmitted 写入 submitted_po_no。
active_draft_id 保存挂起/活跃草稿。
active_run_id/step/expires/lock 与 suspend payload 协同。

discrepancies.title: README 切片状态与当前代码实现不一致
discrepancies.description: README 仍写当前仅完成切片 01/02 与 03-21 待执行，但代码、migrations、tests、Skill 种子已经覆盖后续多个切片。建议更新 README 作为工程状态 SSOT。

discrepancies.title: 原本体模型文档的“数据表建议”与实际 migrations 有字段差异
discrepancies.description: 例如原文档建议 replenishment_draft 使用 draft_items_json/report_markdown 等字段，实际 DDL 使用 items、strategy_version、submitted_po_no、expires_at 等。当前文档包以 migrations 为数据持久化 SSOT。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L1510-L1659

discrepancies.title: 存在两个 011 migration 文件
discrepancies.description: migrations/011-extend-replenishment-adjustment-log.sql 与 migrations/011-seed-agent-skill-def.sql 共享 011 序号；若迁移 runner 仅按文件名排序可运行，但后续维护建议改成唯一编号。

discrepancies.title: 补货调整 workflow 已实现，但 dispatcher 当前返回未接入提示
discrepancies.description: replenishment-adjustment.ts 已包含 load/extract/apply/persist 流程并写日志；但 business-report-dispatcher.ts 对 ADJUST_REPLENISHMENT_DRAFT 返回“尚未完整接入桥接层”。

discrepancies.title: 核心业务实体多数由 ERP/MCP 提供，本仓库不落本地业务主数据表
discrepancies.description: Merchant/Store/Sku/Category/Supplier/SalesSummary/InventorySnapshot 等在本体文档和 MCP 契约中定义，本地 SQL 主要存 Agent 运行态、策略、草稿、会话与审计。
evidence: docs/门店助手Agent_V1_本体模型文档.md:L86-L153
